title: TCWP Policy Label (JSONL line)
description: Control-policy and audit label. Captures whether an action or optimization is safe, valid, reusable, or needs escalation.

target_ref.description: Reference to the action, optimization candidate, or step being labeled

target_type.description: What kind of object is being labeled

approved_for_reuse.description: Whether this action/shortcut is approved for automated replay

approved_for_training.description: Whether this can be used as training data

rationale.description: Why this policy label was assigned

conditions.description: Conditions under which this label applies (e.g., 'only on API 35+', 'only for US locale')

expires_at.description: When this policy label should be re-evaluated
